title: Living in Boulder Vlog 4/14/18: Free Audio History Books Pages

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from his Boulder apartment about a project to create YouTube videos from free audio history books sourced from Kindle and Librivox. He explains his workflow (recording audio, screen-capturing the text, splicing them together), his punctuation editing process, and a personal learning system using bimonthly history tests and rotating audiobook topics to maximize brain absorption.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Acknowledges he bailed on daily exercise after only about a week, which surprised him
Enthusiastic advocate for a biweekly rotation of history topics to keep the brain absorbing at 'maximum bandwidth'
Committed and close to finishing; eager to get it live so he can use it personally as study material
